observations.title: CodexSdk interface needs constructor signature update for env option
observations.rationale: CodexSdk declares `Codex: new () => CodexInstance` with no arguments. Requirement 1 passes `{ env: ... }` to the constructor, so the type needs expanding to `new (options?: { env?: Record<string, string>; apiKey?: string }) => CodexInstance`. External constraint is documented in the request.

observations.title: TC-VL-08 expectation encodes buggy maskSensitive behaviour
observations.rationale: TC-VL-08 expects `sk-ant-api03_...` — the current (buggy) output that exposes the body before the first underscore. After the requirement-5 fix the correct output would be `sk-ant-...`. This test must be updated alongside the fix.

observations.title: B-6 scope expansion may surface existing benign process.env references in adapter/ and util/
observations.rationale: After expanding the B-6 grep to src/adapter/ and src/util/, at least two pre-existing benign process.env references will be flagged: getDebugSubsystems() in src/util/env-filter.ts (reads SPECRUNNER_DEBUG) and the OAuth token resolver call in src/adapter/claude-code/agent-runner.ts:271. Both must be added to arch-allowlist.ts. Request already states 'existing seam-via call-sites (e.g. claude adapter) shall be allowed'.
